heading: Inserting “compliments” forbidden
label: 1106 Inserting “compliments” forbidden
text: A report, document, or publication distributed by or from an executive department or independent agency or establishment of the Government may not contain a notice that it is sent with “the compliments” of an officer of the Government, or with a special notice that it is so sent, except that notice that it has been sent, with a request for an acknowledgment of its receipt, may be given.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 218 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 7328 Stat. 620
